creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 17.10.2010 17:13 (UTC+1), Henry Hu wrote:
> Hello, please try to run with __GL_SINGLE_THREADED=1
> Here is freebsd 8.0-STABLE i386, and it also crashes...
> By the way, are you using the NVidia binary driver?
>

I have only astro/stellarium installed on FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT (amd64) 
with x11/nvidia-driver (version 256.53).

With newer versions of stellarium I have to use __GL_SINGLE_THREADED=1 
to get it work.

But we discussed this in July, don't we?
Rainer
